title: Open Source Documentation and Maintenance Hardening
summary: Audit and harden Sourceright's public GitHub documentation, contributor experience, release hygiene, and maintenance posture.

in_scope: installation, release status, and release notes consistency
CI, docs, coverage, release, and dependency maintenance presentation
public claim discipline for technical preview and benchmark wording
out_of_scope: Rewriting provider, extraction, or verification implementations
Changing repository branch protection or GitHub org settings directly

acceptance_gates: The documentation audit records concrete stale, missing, or inconsistent public documentation surfaces.
The implementation plan separates track creation from public documentation rewrites.
Community-health and maintenance improvements have explicit acceptance criteria.
Public claims are tied to repository evidence and avoid overstating product readiness.
Markdown and policy validation steps are documented for future implementation.
